title: 友だちと頑張った日の1ページ

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm at the library, looking for some materials
related to racing, when...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Wow... what a wonderful tale. I'd love to make a
picture book out of a story like this...

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Hello, Rice. So this is where you were.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Oh. Hi, Bourbon. Did you need something?

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Yes. A dire issue has come up—it threatens to
exploit my vulnerabilities.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
I have been assigned to talk about racing to the
children as part of orientation...

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
I am unfamiliar with such tasks, and thus cannot
simulate a strategy to successfully complete it.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
I have deduced that you may know the secrets to
carrying out this function.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Umm... I'm not sure if I'll be any help either...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Okay, why don't you tell me what you already
have? Imagine I'm one of the kids.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: A test run, you mean. Very well. I will begin now.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
...In brief, sturdy footwork and muscular strength
are important for acceleration.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: That is all. How was that?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Um, I'm sorry... but it felt a little stiff to me...

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Hmm... Stiff?

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: ...Is this better?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Umm... Your smile is cute and all, but your speech
was the problem, not your expression!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
You should make it more fun and easy to
understand since you're talking to kids...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I know! Why not make a paper slideshow
using little illustrations?

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: ...A paper play?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
I think the kids would have a fun time listening to
you talk that way.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
But I do not have any prior experience producing
them, nor do I have much time remaining.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Everything will work out just fine! I'll pitch in too.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
You must really want everyone to enjoy running.
Isn't that why you're serious about this?

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Strictly speaking, I am only following orders... but
that is also part of it, yes.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Then let's work hard on this together. I want our
little friends to have fun running too.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
I just know we can make a wonderful slideshow!
Having a clear goal builds motivation!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Motivation... Very well. I approve. We will do this
for the children.
